title: Beer instead of lcl
wikitext:
[]: Beer, instead of lcl?             Quote Post by Duke » Tue Aug 19, 2008 9:35 pm what do you think it would have been like, if instead of LCL, the entry plug filled up with beer? but still gave the pilots some way to breath?

[]:             Quote Post by Formless One » Tue Aug 19, 2008 9:37 pm Shinji sitting in liquid courage? DAT BE BAD! Asuka sitting in it? That can't be good for anyone involved... Rei?

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Tue Aug 19, 2008 9:39 pm A crazy mix of Beer Fest, Superbad, and NGE.

[]:             Quote Post by Rhyno » Tue Aug 19, 2008 9:52 pm Would we see Asuka, Shinji, Kensuke, and Toji involved in this type of scene?: [url]http://www.metacafe.com/watch/yt-1cY0LaCm6Gg/share_with_friends/[/url]

[]:             Quote Post by Formless One » Tue Aug 19, 2008 9:58 pm YOU JUST BROKE MY BRAIN!

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Tue Aug 19, 2008 10:00 pm WTF, No. They are all underage. They probably wouldn't even know how to do that. OMG. Added: Ignore the blurry baby cranium. [url]http://farm1.static.flickr.com/69/218649840_ab8d7455f8.jpg?v=0[/url]

[]: Re: Beer, instead of lcl?             Quote Post by pat457 » Tue Aug 19, 2008 10:20 pm Duke wrote: what do you think it would have been like, if instead of LCL, the entry plug filled up with beer? but still gave the pilots some way to breath?

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Tue Aug 19, 2008 10:23 pm And Lilith would be Carl from ATHF, peeing.

[]:             Quote Post by Vegeta 20XX » Wed Aug 20, 2008 4:21 am The ID card incident would have ended much differently...

[]:             Quote Post by Zuggy » Wed Aug 20, 2008 7:52 am Formless One wrote: Rei?

[]:             Quote Post by Gamer_2k4 » Wed Aug 20, 2008 10:23 am Action_Bastard wrote: A crazy mix of Beer Fest, Superbad, and NGE.

[]:             Quote Post by Iron Rooster » Wed Aug 20, 2008 10:31 am ^ The entry plugs have plenty of life support. I think it'd probably remove any lethal level of alcohol from the pilots' blood. Now, knowing that alcohol has a chance letting a person's true feelings come out, Asuka would probably roll over into the fetal position because she's not the haughty bitch that others see her as, but a scared emotionally distraught little girl. Shinji would let his anger from all the years of neglect from his father take over and he'll knife everything in sight with his prog knife, even maxing the LCL pressure wouldn't stop him.

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Thu Aug 21, 2008 1:42 am I'd drink it.

[]:             Quote Post by simon » Thu Aug 21, 2008 5:42 am BEsERk EVA01 wrote: I'd drink it.

[]:             Quote Post by BEsERk EVA01 » Thu Aug 21, 2008 6:49 am simon wrote: BEsERk EVA01 wrote: I'd drink it.

[]:             Quote Post by master_lloyd » Fri Aug 22, 2008 9:04 am BEsERk EVA01 wrote: [URL=http://img229.imageshack.us/my.php?image=sfosterslagerxm1.jpg] [/URL]

[]:             Quote Post by p06 » Fri Aug 22, 2008 9:46 am Evas would defeat angels using drunken fists rather than oversized machine guns and prog knifes.

[]:             Quote Post by Action_Bastard » Fri Aug 22, 2008 10:05 am Yes, it would induces berserkness.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Fri Aug 22, 2008 10:33 am Asuka and Shinji would let their inhibitions go and start to make out. Misato in the meanwhile would dive into Rei's entry plug and start to drink up as much beer as she could. Maybe even try to make out with teh Rei >=3 who'd just react Legolas style.

[]:             Quote Post by pat457 » Fri Aug 22, 2008 6:12 pm Sailor Star Dust wrote: Asuka and Shinji would let their inhibitions go and start to make out. Misato in the meanwhile would dive into Rei's entry plug and start to drink up as much beer as she could. Maybe even try to make out with teh Rei >=3 who'd just react Legolas style.
summary:
[]: Beer, instead of lcl?             Quote Post by Duke » Tue Aug 19, 2008 9:35 pm what do you think it would have been like, if instead of LCL, the entry plug filled up with beer? but still gave the pilots some way to breath?

[]:             Quote Post by Formless One » Tue Aug 19, 2008 9:37 pm Shinji sitting in liquid courage? DAT BE BAD! Asuka sitting in it? That can't be good
